case_title: MATTHEW MIRALDI ET AL VS. SIMON KATZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,152.00 FILED BY MIRALDI, MATTHEW MIRALDI, CAMILLE AS TO DEFENDANT KATZ, SIMON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-27-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIRALDI, MATTHEW AS TO DEFENDANT KATZ, SIMON
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-07-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KATZ, SIMON
REMARK: PLANTIFF'S EXHIBITS SUBMITTED VIA DROP BOX

DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT. PARTIES AGREE TO RESOLVE THE CASE WITH (1) NO PAYMENT FROM DEFENDANT TO PLAINTIFFS AS EVIDENCE SUPPORT FINDING PLAINTIFFS HAD NO VALID BASIS TO TERMINATE THEIR TERMED LEASE EARLY AND (2) MUTUAL RELEASES OF ALL CLAIMS ARISING FROM THE TENANCY, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO DEFENDANT'S WAIVER OF THE $32.3K RENT OWED ALONG WITH RELATED DAMAGES. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY MIRALDI, MATTHEW MIRALDI, CAMILLE KATZ, SIMON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-27-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-27-2022 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFFS MATTHEW MIRALDI AND CAMILE MIRALDI ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT SIMON KATZ IS PRESENT. HONORABLE PANG LY TOOK CASE UNDER SUBMISSION UNTIL STATUS UPDATE IS TO BE RECEIVED (NO LATER THEN 5/27) FROM DEFENDANT VIA D506 EMAIL BOX . NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
